pages.title: Arena Tiles
pages.text: The combat arena is built from different tile types:$(br2)$(b)Normal Tiles$() - Walk freely on grass, stone, sand, etc.$(br2)$(b)Obstacles$() - Trees, rocks, and walls block movement. You cannot walk through them, but some enemies can!

pages.title: Special Tiles
pages.text: $(b)Water Tiles$() - Require a boat in your inventory to cross. Enemies cannot cross water unless they are aquatic (like Drowned).$(br2)Each biome has unique terrain features that affect strategy. Use obstacles as cover and water as barriers!
